headline: Fortnite is getting a bunch of AI-powered ‘personas’
summary: Fortnite is introducing 36 AI-powered characters with unique voices. Creators can integrate these NPCs into their experiences from July 30th. Epic Games aims to enhance in-game interactions with these new additions.

headline: Samsung’s 55-inch Frame art TV is $200 cheaper than usual
summary: Samsung's 55-inch Frame TV is currently $200 off its usual price. This unique 4K TV displays art when not actively in use. Its design mimics a framed artwork with customizable bezels.

headline: Netflix says around 300 titles used generative AI
summary: Netflix reports roughly 300 titles on its platform have utilized generative AI. Most AI implementation occurred during post-production. The company uses AI to deliver higher quality content faster and cheaper.

headline: Why are people buying so many CDs?
summary: CD sales surprisingly increased by 16% in the US in the first half of 2026. Fans are buying CDs as an affordable way to support artists. A total of 16.3 million CDs were sold during this period.

headline: God of War Show Filming Paused After Kratos Actor Ryan Hurst Tears Bicep Filming Stunt
summary: Production for the God of War show has been halted. Kratos actor Ryan Hurst tore his bicep while filming a stunt. The injury caused a pause for the Amazon MGM and Sony Pictures series.

headline: Game of Thrones: War for Westeros Release Date Delayed to Early 2027
summary: The release of Game of Thrones: War for Westeros has been delayed. The real-time strategy game is now expected in early 2027. PlaySide Studios announced the postponement for the HBO series adaptation.

headline: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Director Reveals Why Ubisoft Ditched Edward's Hidden Blade Combat
summary: The director of Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced explained changes to Edward Kenway's combat. Ubisoft removed some beloved hidden blade fighting moves from the game. Fans are advised not to lose hope for their potential return in the future.

headline: Google Pixel 11 Specs Leak Ahead of Next Month’s Unveiling
summary: Early leaks reveal potential specifications for the upcoming Google Pixel 11 series. Details include specs for the Pixel 11, Pro, and Pro Fold models. Anticipate new color options and a price increase across the lineup.

headline: Burnham to promise new path for UK when he becomes new Labour leader
summary: Burnham will outline his vision for a new direction for the UK. He is set to deliver a significant speech on Friday. He is expected to become the new prime minister next week.

headline: Sadiq Khan among 26 new peers to enter the Lords
summary: London Mayor Sadiq Khan is among 26 new appointments to the House of Lords. Broadcaster June Sarpong and former union chief Christina McAnea also join the peers. The appointments mark a notable reshuffle in the UK's upper house.

headline: Fifa 'assessing match reports' over Falklands banner
summary: Fifa is reviewing match reports concerning an Argentina Falklands banner. Argentine players displayed a banner supporting claims to the Falkland Islands. Fifa will decide on potential disciplinary action following the political display.

headline: Blasts reported in Iran as US launches new wave of strikes
summary: Iran reports US strikes hitting bridges in the country. The US has launched a new wave of attacks, escalating regional tensions. A US ship was reportedly boarded in the Strait of Hormuz amid the conflict.
